node.content: emQube launched a modern Shopify e-commerce portal to provide a unified marketplace for wellness products and services.
node.title: Holistic Wellness Products & Services Marketplace

node.content: emQube developed a visually engaging WooCommerce store designed to simplify the discovery and purchase of educational materials and toys for children.
node.title: Educational E-Commerce Storefront

node.content: emQube deployed a robust Adobe Commerce (Magento) storefront that integrates online sales directly with the company’s backend SAP ERP system.
node.title: Integrated B2B & B2C E-Commerce Portal

node.content: emQube designed a high-impact, rich-interface Power BI dashboard for display on LED screens to monitor judicial performance and workload KPIs.
node.title: Judicial Performance & Workload Dashboard

node.content: emQube implemented Power BI dashboards to provide live financial and operational reporting, integrated directly with internal SQL Server databases.
node.title: Power BI Operational & Financial Reporting Suite

node.content: emQube migrated legacy reports to Tableau dashboards, embedded within an application to provide regional teams with inventory and sales analytics.
node.title: Tableau-Based Inventory Planning Dashboard

node.content: emQube built an AI chatbot trained on historical customer service logs to automatically answer enquiries about services, regulations, and pricing.
node.title: Historical-Data Trained AI Service Bot

node.content: emQube transformed a corporate homepage into a conversational GenAI interface, allowing visitors to query services without traditional site navigation.
node.title: Homepage GenAI Conversational Interface

node.content: emQube integrated an AI-powered chatbot into a financial broker’s website to answer visitor inquiries using the site’s own knowledge base.
node.title: AI-Powered Financial Enquiry Chatbot

node.content: emQube integrated a WhatsApp chatbot with a low-code platform to provide customers with automated, periodic updates on their furniture project progress.
node.title: Automated Project Progress WhatsApp Updates

node.content: emQube integrated a WhatsApp chatbot with the client’s back-office system to deliver automated move confirmations, schedule alerts, and customer service surveys.
node.title: Automated WhatsApp Service Bot

node.content: emQube created a robust mobile application for field crew leaders to manage relocation, storage, and furniture installation operations from start to finish.
node.title: Field Operations Management App

node.content: emQube built a comprehensive task-management and sharing tool, deployed as both a desktop platform and a Progressive Web App (PWA), for an enterprise workforce.
node.title: Daily Task Prioritization & Management Tool

node.content: emQube developed a mobile application that allows users to store, categorize, and retrieve digital receipts and appliance warranties in a centralized, secure vault.
node.title: Digital Warranty & Receipt Vault

node.content: emQube developed a secure digital registry application to manage the creation, encryption, and storage of wills for non-Muslim expatriates in Dubai.
node.title: Secure Digital Wills Registry Platform

node.content: emQube developed a comprehensive web-based platform to streamline the scheduling, tracking, and financial administration of Key Opinion Leader (KOL) interactions.
node.title: Pharma Expert Engagement Platform

node.content: emQube developed a dedicated workflow application that enables automotive regional headquarters to track, monitor, and resolve customer service escalations from local service centers.
node.title: Automotive Customer Escalation Portal

node.content: emQube implemented a menu-driven WhatsApp chatbot that allows website visitors to query product information and submit leads directly through the platform.
node.title: WhatsApp Conversational Enquiry Bot

node.content: emQube engineered a comprehensive reporting tool that consolidates multi-country sales and inventory data for a Swiss coffee company’s Middle East regional office
node.title: Regional Sales & Stock Consolidation Tool

node.content: emQube engineered a centralized web-based portal to manage MIS, inventory, and forecasting across 11 countries for a luxury automotive regional office.
node.title: Automotive Regional Sales & Inventory Portal

node.content: emQube built an integrated online portal allowing insurance brokers to manage, compare, and issue policies from multiple insurance providers for their customers.
node.title: Multi-Provider Insurance Aggregator Portal
